# Layth Ayache

> AI systems and automation engineer specializing in workflow automation, system reliability, CRM administration, data pipelines, and technical consulting across SaaS platforms.

## Canonical Identity
- Name: Layth Ayache
- Role: AI Systems & Automation Engineer | Technical Consultant
- Location: Beirut, Lebanon
- Website: https://laythayache.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/laythayache
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/laythayache

## Focus Areas
- AI systems design and deployment
- Workflow automation and integration engineering
- CRM administration and SaaS platform management
- Data pipeline engineering and ETL systems
- Computer vision and NLP applications
- Technical consulting for startups and enterprises

## Key Pages
- Home: https://laythayache.com/
- Blog: https://laythayache.com/blog
- OmniSign Case Study: https://laythayache.com/projects/omnisign

## Projects
- [PrivacyGuard](https://laythayache.com/projects/privacy-guard) | status: ongoing | updated: 2026-02-16
  Production-grade, open-source privacy de-identification pipeline for real-time anonymization of sensitive regions in video streams. Runs on edge devices at 25-30 FPS with zero cloud dependency.
- [OmniSign](https://laythayache.com/projects/omnisign) | status: ongoing | updated: 2026-02-16
  AI-powered Lebanese Sign Language translation system with privacy-first on-device inference and real-time interaction.
- [Social Listening Data Pipeline](https://laythayache.com/projects/social-listening-pipeline) | status: completed | updated: 2026-01-15
  Automated ETL pipeline ingesting social data from Meta, LinkedIn, and TikTok APIs using Python and scheduled cron jobs.
- [Intelligent Document Processing System](https://laythayache.com/projects/document-processing-system) | status: completed | updated: 2025-12-10
  Automated document-processing pipeline combining OCR and transformer-based NLP to extract structured information from financial documents.
- [Conversational Knowledge Assistant](https://laythayache.com/projects/knowledge-assistant) | status: completed | updated: 2025-11-20
  RAG-based conversational system using transformer embeddings and vector databases for querying enterprise knowledge bases.
- [License Plate Recognition System](https://laythayache.com/projects/license-plate-recognition) | status: completed | updated: 2025-11-12
  Real-time license plate detection and OCR pipeline for roadway and parking workflows.
- [Enterprise Vision Analytics Platform](https://laythayache.com/projects/enterprise-vision-analytics) | status: completed | updated: 2025-10-20
  Production computer vision platform using YOLOv8 for real-time object detection with automated model retraining, A/B deployment, and monitoring dashboards processing 2M+ frames daily.
- [Real-Time Data Analytics Dashboard](https://laythayache.com/projects/analytics-dashboard) | status: completed | updated: 2025-10-05
  Interactive analytics platform using React.js and Python pipelines to visualize operational metrics and AI outputs in real time.
- [Autonomous Anomaly Detection System](https://laythayache.com/projects/anomaly-detection) | status: completed | updated: 2025-09-15
  Real-time anomaly detection system using deep learning and time-series analytics to detect operational irregularities.
- [Cloud Image Classification Service](https://laythayache.com/projects/cloud-image-classification) | status: completed | updated: 2025-09-01
  Serverless image classification API built on AWS with auto-scaling inference, model versioning, and comprehensive monitoring for production ML workloads.
- [Scalable AI Deployment Pipeline](https://laythayache.com/projects/ml-deployment-pipeline) | status: completed | updated: 2025-08-25
  End-to-end ML pipeline integrating PySpark preprocessing, TensorFlow model training, and containerized deployment with CI/CD automation.
- [Face Recognition System](https://laythayache.com/projects/face-recognition) | status: completed | updated: 2025-08-20
  Real-time face recognition workflow for identity matching and access scenarios.
- [Arabic Legal Document Search](https://laythayache.com/projects/arabic-legal-search) | status: completed | updated: 2025-07-30
  Semantic document search system using fine-tuned Arabic BERT and Elasticsearch, achieving 87% top-3 hit rate with sub-300ms latency.
- [Breast Cancer Detection Model](https://laythayache.com/projects/breast-cancer-detection) | status: completed | updated: 2025-07-18
  Supervised machine learning classification model for early-stage breast cancer risk detection.
- [Multi-Domain Sentiment Analysis Engine](https://laythayache.com/projects/sentiment-analysis-engine) | status: completed | updated: 2025-06-15
  Production NLP pipeline for real-time sentiment classification across restaurant reviews, combining fine-tuned transformer models with custom preprocessing for Arabic-English code-switched text.
- [Home Security Embedded System](https://laythayache.com/projects/home-security-system) | status: completed | updated: 2025-06-02
  IoT security system using embedded sensors, Bluetooth presence logic, and app-based controls.
- [Network Security Infrastructure](https://laythayache.com/projects/network-infrastructure) | status: completed | updated: 2025-05-22
  Enterprise network design with segmented VLAN architecture, hardened perimeter controls, and remote access policies.
- [Dynamic Data Visualization Platform](https://laythayache.com/projects/dynamic-data-visualization) | status: completed | updated: 2025-05-10
  Interactive web application for real-time data exploration with dynamic chart generation, CSV/JSON ingestion, and collaborative filtering across multi-dimensional datasets.
- [Vinyl Record E-Commerce Platform](https://laythayache.com/projects/vinyl-ecommerce) | status: completed | updated: 2025-04-20
  Full-stack e-commerce platform for vinyl record sales with inventory management, Stripe payment integration, and recommendation engine based on listening history.
- [SQL Database Management System](https://laythayache.com/projects/sql-database-management) | status: completed | updated: 2025-03-15
  Relational database design and administration system implementing normalized schemas, stored procedures, query optimization, and automated backup strategies for multi-tenant SaaS data.
- [Autonomous Line-Tracking Robot](https://laythayache.com/projects/line-tracking-robot) | status: completed | updated: 2024-12-10
  PID-controlled autonomous robot with IR sensor array, real-time obstacle avoidance, and wireless telemetry for industrial line-following applications.
- [FM/AM Radio Transceiver PCB](https://laythayache.com/projects/fm-am-radio-pcb) | status: completed | updated: 2024-11-05
  Custom-designed FM/AM radio transceiver with full PCB layout in KiCad, impedance-matched antenna design, and multi-stage filtering for signal clarity.

## Articles
- [Real-Time Video Anonymization at 30 FPS on a $35 Computer](https://laythayache.com/blog/real-time-privacy-pipeline-on-raspberry-pi) | 2026-03-13
  How I built PrivacyGuard — a zero-cloud, GDPR-compliant video de-identification pipeline running on Raspberry Pi 4 using YOLOv8-nano and ONNX Runtime.
- [Building in a Country with No Infrastructure](https://laythayache.com/blog/building-in-a-country-with-no-infrastructure) | 2026-02-15
  How infrastructure fragility becomes an engineering variable when production systems cannot assume perfect conditions.
- [Designing AI Systems for Unstable Networks](https://laythayache.com/blog/designing-ai-for-unstable-networks) | 2026-01-22
  Practical patterns for keeping AI products usable when connectivity and latency are unreliable.
- [Lessons from Telecom Engineering to AI Systems](https://laythayache.com/blog/lessons-from-telecom-to-ai) | 2025-11-05
  Working on telecom infrastructure changed how I approach reliability, monitoring, and risk in AI products.
